title: limonium × pericotii
intro: Limonium × pericotii, also known as the 'Dwarf Purple Fountain', is a hybrid of the Limonium species, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and compact growth. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its high concentration of flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Limonium × pericotii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken orally as supplements, or applied topically for skin and wound care.
